text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho is here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature steps onto the racecourse focused on
her goal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To win the race and become a top-class runner
both in name and reality.
